differential_diagnoses: Hypersensitivity pneumonitis with severe pulmonary vascular involvement
next_steps: Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutations (associated with PVOD/PCH)
Consider discontinuation of pulmonary vasodilators due to risk of precipitation of pulmonary edema
Right heart catheterization with fluid challenge (cautious) to further assess hemodynamic response
Surgical or transbronchial lung biopsy if patient stability permits, though high risk
Inotropic support as needed for right ventricular failure
Bridge to transplant planning (ECMO candidacy evaluation)
